title: lilium speciosum f. album-novum
intro: Lilium speciosum f. album-novum, also known as the 'Album Novum Lily', is a variety of the Lilium speciosum species, a type of lily plant native to Japan. This plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a treatment for various health issues, including fever reduction and relief from rheumatoid arthritis. The Album Novum Lily is also believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant's bulbs and flowers are often prepared as a tea or used in infusions to extract its medicinal properties.
